items.claim: Bobby King has a cardio advantage if the fight goes into the second or third round.
items.quote: if it goes into the second third, Bobby King is going to have an advantage.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney is explosive in the first couple of minutes.
items.quote: That first first couple minutes, Terrence is going to be explosive

items.claim: Brandon Royval has cardio that is off the charts.
items.quote: The guy's cardio is is off the charts.

items.claim: Brandon Royval leaves his chin exposed.
items.quote: He leaves his chin exposed a bit.

items.claim: Mario Bautista is on an eight-fight win streak.
items.quote: He's on eight-fight win streak there

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett fights well off his back and possesses a dangerous triangle and armbar.
items.quote: He he he he fights really well off his back. He's got a dangerous triangle. He's got a dangerous armbar.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett leaves his chin up in the air when he throws his left hook.
items.quote: When he throws his left hook, that chin is up in the air.

items.claim: Benoît Saint Denis is not afraid of Paddy Pimblett's grappling or submissions.
items.quote: Benoît's not going to be afraid of of Paddy Pimblett's grappling.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been out of competition for five years.
items.quote: He's been out for 5 years, a clean 5 years.

items.claim: Max Holloway is one of the best five-round fighters in a striking match.
items.quote: In my opinion, one of the best five-round fighters out there, especially when it comes to a striking match.
